summary: Tested Account/Billing separation and TopBar dropdown redesign. All main features working correctly. TopBar dropdown shows user card + 5 menu items (Athlete Profile, Settings, Account, Billing, Sign Out) - all navigating correctly. Sidebar cleaned up - no Profile/Account/Settings links for athletes. Account page has Personal Info, Password, Notifications, Privacy, Danger Zone without subscription content. Billing page has Current Plan, usage bars, plan features, billing history. Minor bug found: Billing History PLAN column shows 'NaN' instead of plan name.

ui_bugs.issue: PLAN column shows 'NaN' instead of actual plan name for transactions
ui_bugs.root_cause: Line 316 in BillingPage.js: when txn.plan is undefined, the expression 'txn.plan?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + txn.plan?.slice(1)' returns NaN because undefined + undefined = NaN

action_items: Fix BillingPage.js line 316 NaN display for plan name in billing history
critical_code_review_comments: BillingPage.js line 316: null-coalescing issue causing NaN - needs ternary check for txn.plan before string operations

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work except minor NaN display bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Account/Billing separation tested and verified. TopBar dropdown has data-testids: user-menu-trigger, user-menu-dropdown, menu-athlete-profile-link, menu-athlete-settings-link, menu-account-link, menu-billing-link, menu-logout-link. Sidebar nav items for athletes: nav-board, nav-pipeline, nav-schools, nav-calendar, nav-inbox, nav-highlights, nav-analytics. No nav-profile, nav-account, nav-settings in sidebar (moved to dropdown). Account page sections: personal-info-card, password-section, notifications-section, privacy-section, danger-zone. Billing page sections: billing-page, current-plan-card, billing-upgrade-btn, billing-history-card. Note: plan-features-card testid exists but may not render for all tiers.
